summary: Successfully extracted 569 voice library entries from existing voice library sources. Processed 150 paragraph chunks (curated from LinkedIn posts), 0 voice primitives from markdown (file is template-only), and 419 high-ranking LinkedIn primitives (score >= 0.7). All entries tagged with source for traceability.
broadcast: Voice library has 569 entries. Paragraph chunks overlap with LinkedIn posts from D1.1 — recommend keeping both forms (full post + chunk) for different training signals. The voice-primitives.md is currently template-only. High-value ranked LinkedIn primitives (419 entries) provide strong signal for LoRA training.
learnings: Voice primitives markdown file is template-only - no extractable content yet
Paragraph chunks include source_post_id metadata for deduplication coordination with D5.1
LinkedIn primitives ranked dataset has 576 total entries, filtered to 419 high-quality (score >= 0.7)
Text preprocessing needed to handle escaped quotes and newlines from JSONL sources
